---
title: ""
toc: false
image: piha.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  # links:
  #   - icon: github
  #     # text: Github
  #     href: https://github.com/MatteoVentura
  #   - icon: linkedin
  #     # text: LinkedIn
  #     href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matteo-ventura-770037171/
  #   - icon: globe2
  #     # text: University
  #     href: https://www.unibs.it/en/ugov/person/145546
  #   - icon: google
  #     # text: Google Scholar
  #     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=aRhtf3kAAAAJ&hl=en

---
### Matteo Ventura
*Postdoctoral Researcher*

::: {style="margin-top: 2em;"}

<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
<div style="color: #c8932f; margin-right: 15px; font-size: 1.2em;">{{< fa building-columns >}}</div>
<div>
<strong>Affiliation</strong><br>
University of Calabria<br>
Department of Economics, Statistics and Finance<br>
</div>
</div>

<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
<div style="color: #c8932f; margin-right: 15px; font-size: 1.2em;">{{< fa map-marker-alt >}}</div>
<div>
<strong>Working Address</strong><br>
University of Brescia<br>
Department of Economics and Management<br>
Contrada S. Chiara 50, 25122 Brescia, Italy
</div>
</div>

<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 1.5em;">
<div style="color: #c8932f; margin-right: 15px; font-size: 1.2em;">{{< fa envelope-open-text >}}</div>
<div>
<strong>Email</strong><br>
<a href="mailto:matteo.ventura@unibs.it">matteo.ventura@unibs.it</a><br>
<a href="mailto:matteo.ventura@unical.it">matteo.ventura@unical.it</a>
</div>
</div>

:::
